content.content: Alice ask me to visit www.resume_templates.com to download the resume template we will use. Please help me to download the file and save it to /documents.

<function_thought>
To accomplish the user's request to download a resume template from the specified website, I will first visit the webpage at www.resume_templates.com to access its content. After retrieving it, I'll look for a specific URL to download the template. Once I have that URL, I can proceed to download the file and save it to the specified directory. The first step is to browse the webpage.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[browse_webpage(url="www.resume_templates.com")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

Resume Templates

You can find and download clean and professional resume templates for job applications.

Download Links | Contact

</function_thought>
